title: Nespresso 胶囊 —— 钩子(高毛利复购)
contentDateLabel: 2010 年(胶囊收入承载整个模式)

description.en: Sell proprietary aluminium capsules at high gross margin (~80%+) to customers who already own a Nespresso machine. The capsule interface was patent-protected (Original line 1986-2012/2014, Vertuo line 2014-2034). Sold through Nespresso Club (members-only direct), boutiques, and select retailers — never through traditional supermarket distribution to maintain price control. Each Nespresso machine in a kitchen produces multi-year recurring capsule revenue.
description.zh: 向已经拥有 Nespresso 机器的客户高毛利出售专属铝胶囊(80%+ 毛利)。胶囊接口受专利保护(Original 系列 1986-2012/2014,Vertuo 系列 2014-2034)。通过 Nespresso 俱乐部(会员直供)、精品店、选定零售商出售 —— 故意不进传统超市分销以维持价格控制。厨房里的每一台 Nespresso 机器都产生多年期的胶囊复购收入。
